title: mentha glabrior
intro: Mentha glabrior, also known as Mentha glabrata, is a species of mint plant native to Africa and the Indian subcontinent. This plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, including menthol and other terpenes, which have been traditionally used to relieve digestive issues and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha glabrior include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate headaches and fever. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
